blocks.text: Restoration Promised for Israel and Judah
The word that came to Jeremiah from the Lord:
Thus says the Lord, the God of Israel: Write in a book all the words that I have spoken to you.

For the days are surely coming, says the Lord, when I will restore the fortunes of my people, Israel and Judah, says the Lord, and I will bring them back to the land that I gave to their ancestors, and they shall take possession of it.
These are the words that the Lord spoke concerning Israel and Judah:
Thus says the Lord:
Ask now and see:
Alas! that day is so great
On that day, says the Lord of hosts, I will break his yoke from off your neck, and I will burst your bonds, and strangers shall no more make a servant of him.
But they shall serve the Lord their God and David their king, whom I will raise up for them.
But as for you, have no fear, my servant Jacob, says the Lord,
For I am with you, says the Lord, to save you;
For thus says the Lord:
There is no one to uphold your cause,
All your lovers have forgotten you;
Why do you cry out over your hurt?
Therefore all who devour you shall be devoured,
For I will restore health to you,
Thus says the Lord:
Out of them shall come thanksgiving
Their children shall be as of old;
Their prince shall be one of their own;
And you shall be my people,
Look, the storm of the Lord!
The fierce anger of the Lord will not turn back
